name: Jamey Haddad
abstract: Jamey George Haddad (born July 2, 1952 in Cleveland, Ohio) is an American percussionist who works primarily in the fields of jazz and world music and specializes in hand drums.

concerts.label: New York City Gay Men's Chorus
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Absence (Improvisation for Percussion and Live Electronics)

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: the other band that I’ve had since ’91, with Vic Juris, Tony Marino, Jamey Haddad for 10 years
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tony Marino
about_quotes.evidence: Well we played with Jamey Haddad was a great drummer/percussionist you know. Jamey and I played with her
about_quotes.doc_title: Tony Marino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 25, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Lellis
about_quotes.evidence: I did a performance at the IAJE in New York in 1998 with Joe Locke and Tony Marino... and Jamey Haddad.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Lellis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, July 31, 2007
